query:
SELECT fullName, grade, classroom, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM students 
GROUP BY fullName, grade, classroom 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 
ORDER BY count DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT fullName, grade, classroom, COUNT(*) as count
